title: rubus × scytophyllus
intro: Rubus × scytophyllus, also known as the hybrid black raspberry or hybrid black thimbleberry, is a plant species in the family Rosaceae, resulting from the cross between Rubus argutus and Rubus fruticosus. The leaves and roots of Rubus × scytophyllus have been used in traditional medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus × scytophyllus are attributed to its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of Rubus × scytophyllus can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine and natural health practices.
